Appearances:
Plaintiff Citywide Properties is present. Represented by Bill Cosgrove.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jeremy Boivin is present.
Attorney Katherine Ragusa appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of September 6, 2016 is vacated. (501)
